rationale: The cited 2002 study analyzes TV ad executional cues and viewer feelings as predictors of advertising effectiveness (sales response to added media weight), and the citing 2006 study explicitly positions itself against prior work linking executional elements to ad effectiveness and compares its similarity drivers to those predictors. Given this direct construct overlap (executional elements, viewer responses, TV ads), the citation is plausibly a substantive theoretical/empirical source rather than an incidental mention.
